name: AUTOPORT USA LLC
description_short: Independent used car dealership in Tampa, FL selling pre-owned vehicles averaging ~$8,000. Offers trade-ins, financing assistance, and warranties on select vehicles.
description_long:
AUTOPORT USA LLC is a small, independent used car dealership founded in January 2024 and based in Tampa, Florida, operating under manager Metin Acar. The business operates from 10500 N Florida Ave, Tampa, FL 33612 and functions as a retail-facing vehicle sales operation. It carries no CDFI, HUD, NFCC, or financial services certifications — it is a licensed used vehicle dealer serving the local Tampa Bay consumer market.

The dealership maintains a rotating inventory of approximately 40 used vehicles at any given time, with an average asking price of around $8,001 and typical model years near 2015 with roughly 106,000 miles. Core offerings include retail used vehicle sales, trade-in acceptance, financing assistance (helping buyers identify and secure payment plans through third-party lenders), and warranties on select vehicles with terms that vary by unit. There is no on-site service or repair facility.

Despite being a very young business, AUTOPORT USA has accumulated a notably strong customer reputation. The dealership holds a 5.0-star rating on Google from 136 reviews, a 5.0 on Birdeye from 123 reviews, and a 4.7 on iSeeCars. Customers frequently name staff members Metin and Matt specifically for their transparency and professionalism, and cite a notably fast, low-pressure purchase process. The dealership also maintains active listings on CarFax, CarGurus, AutoTrader, and Yelp.

The primary strength here is the dealership's customer service reputation — rare for any used car operation to sustain a 5.0 across multiple review platforms. The honest limitations are equally clear: AUTOPORT USA was founded in early 2024, giving it a very short track record of roughly two years. Its inventory targets the budget segment (sub-$10K, high-mileage vehicles), which suits cost-conscious buyers but limits appeal to shoppers seeking newer or lower-mileage units. BBB accreditation has not been obtained, and the exact BBB letter grade is unverified. Buyers should conduct standard pre-purchase vehicle inspections since there is no in-house service department.

pricing.guarantee_details: No money-back guarantee policy found. Contact provider for details.

pros: 5.0-star Google rating from 136 reviews — exceptionally rare for a used car dealership
5.0 on Birdeye (123 reviews) and 4.7 on iSeeCars confirm consistent cross-platform reputation
Staff (Metin and Matt) repeatedly cited by name for transparency and honest communication
Fast, low-pressure purchase process noted across multiple customer reviews
Trade-in acceptance provides a one-stop option for buyers replacing a current vehicle
Financing assistance available — helps buyers without upfront cash arrange payment plans
Average vehicle price ~$8,000 makes inventory accessible to budget-conscious buyers
cons: Founded January 2024 — only about two years of operating history, limited long-term track record
Inventory skews toward older, high-mileage vehicles (~2015 model year, ~106K miles average)
No on-site service or repair center — buyers must arrange independent pre-purchase inspections
BBB not accredited; exact BBB grade unverified
Small independent lot (~40 vehicles) means limited selection compared to larger dealerships
best_for: Tampa-area buyers seeking affordable used vehicles under $10,000
Buyers who need financing assistance to purchase a used vehicle
Customers looking to trade in a current vehicle toward a used car purchase
First-time buyers or budget-constrained shoppers who prioritize low-pressure service over wide selection
diagnosis: AUTOPORT USA LLC is best suited for Tampa-area consumers shopping for budget-priced used vehicles (averaging ~$8K) who value a transparent, no-pressure sales experience backed by unusually strong customer reviews. The main caveat is that this is a very young dealership (founded 2024) with a small, high-mileage inventory and no in-house service facility, so buyers should plan for independent vehicle inspections before purchase.
services: Warranties on select vehicles (terms vary by unit)
Vehicle listings on CarFax, CarGurus, AutoTrader, and iSeeCars
In-person dealership consultations at Tampa, FL location
